title: Are Tech Layoffs Going to Be a Headache for Alexandria Real Estate Equities?
text: Tech layoffs are in the news, but life sciences companies seem to be doing better.

title: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. to Present Today on Its Superior Results, Distinctive Impact and Lasting Endurance at the 29th Annual Baron Investment Conference
text: NEW YORK , Nov. 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (NYSE: ARE), the first, preeminent, longest-tenured and pioneering owner, operator and developer uniquely focused on collaborative life science, agtech and technology campuses in AAA innovation cluster locations with over 1,000 tenants, today announced that its executive chairman and founder, Joel S. Marcus, will present at the 29th Annual Baron Investment Conference in New York City this morning.
